mentions.note: Logistics REIT pivoting to data center with 5.6 GW power and 1.3 GW solar (only 8% of roofs done; huge runway). Core portfolio sold out; e-commerce tailwinds (uses 3x warehouse space). $750M mark-to-market organic growth opportunity on 11k leases. New CEO Dan Letter continues excellence culture. 3% yield; only REIT to bottom in 2008 recession; long-time fan.
